disasterTypeDesc.fire: Building fire, market fire, or vegetation fire.
disasterTypeDesc.other: Any urgent event not listed above.

sensorTypeDesc.water_level: Water height measured by ultrasonic sensor (HC-SR04) in river, channel or drain.
sensorTypeDesc.rainfall: Rain intensity measured by tipping-bucket gauge or YL-83 sensor.
sensorTypeDesc.soil_moisture: Soil saturation measured by capacitive sensor. Saturated soil = runoff risk.

footer.tagline: Citizen watch for natural disasters in Douala. Report. Inform. Protect.
footer.projectBlurb: Independent citizen initiative. Reports are manually validated before publication.

hero.lead: The first citizen watch dedicated to natural disasters in Douala. Floods, landslides, fires: report in seconds, get validated alerts for your neighborhood.
hero.rainSeasonHeadline: Akwa and Bonabéri under watch after 36 mm in 2 hours.

problem.lead: Douala faces every rainy season at the pace of rising waters. Without a reliable information channel, residents often learn about damage too late.
problem.stat1Title: flood events recorded in Douala since 2010
problem.stat1Body: Longer rainy seasons, rapid urbanization, saturated drainage.
problem.stat2Body: Bonabéri, Akwa, Ndogpassi, Bépanda, Makepè, Logbessou and 6 others.
problem.stat3Body: Loss of life, property damage, forced displacement.

how.step1Body: Photo, location, short description: it takes seconds. Automatic geolocation pinpoints the exact neighborhood.
how.step2Body: A team of citizen admins checks every report before publication. No false alarms, no needless panic.
how.step3Body: Push notifications to nearby residents, live feed on the map, alerts available 24/7. The whole city stays tuned.

ctaFinal.title: A better-prepared city starts with a single sentinel.
ctaFinal.body: Free sign-up. No spam, no ads, just alerts that can save lives.

live.empty: No recent alerts — be the first Douala sentinel.

mapPreview.lead: View active alerts, real-time IoT sensors, and historical risk zones of Douala on a single map.

testimonials.q1Body: The morning of the Akwa flood, I warned my mother in 30 seconds. My family no longer waits for the radio.
testimonials.q2Body: As a shopkeeper in Bonabéri, I lose goods every rainy season. With Alerte Douala, I know when to close shop.
testimonials.q3Body: I validate reports two evenings a week. It's my way of protecting my neighborhood without leaving home.

ticker.empty: All clear. Good news for Douala.

map.title: Douala monitoring
map.lead: Risk zones, IoT sensors, and validated citizen alerts across the whole city. Hover a zone to view its risk summary.
map.sideLead: Summary of neighborhoods with detected activity or risk.
map.sideEmpty: No risk zone detected at the moment.

reportForm.step1Hint: A clear photo helps validate your report faster.
reportForm.fallbackLabel: Pick an image from your device
reportForm.permissionDefault: Camera is not available. Pick an image from your device instead.
reportForm.titlePlaceholder: E.g., Flooding on main Akwa street
reportForm.addressPlaceholder: E.g., Deido roundabout, near the market
reportForm.titleTooShort: Title must be at least 4 characters.
reportForm.checkFields: Check the highlighted fields before sending.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.lead: Overview of the citizen watch across Douala.
dashboard.errorBody: Could not load the console. Try again later.

pending.title: Reports to validate
pending.validateBody: The report will become publicly visible and the author will be notified.

alerts.lead: Full view of validated, pending and rejected reports, plus live sensor activity.
alerts.empty: Nothing to display in this view.

map.title: Admin map
map.lead: Full view: reports (validated + pending), sensors with alert levels, risk zones.

sensors.title: Sensors
sensors.lead: Manage your ESP32 sensor fleet for flood prevention.

form.deviceIdHint: E.g., ESP32-AKWA-001 — must match the firmware
form.name: Name

alertsFeed.emptyHint: Clear the filters to see everything.

installPrompt.title: Install Alerte Douala
installPrompt.body: Install the app on your device to launch it like a native app — no browser needed.
installPrompt.iosBody: On iPhone / iPad: tap <1>Share</1> <2>⬆︎</2> then <3>“Add to Home Screen”</3>.

errors.unauthorized: Session expired. Please sign in again.

placeholder.body: This section is under construction. Check back soon.

login.manifesto: Pick up the watch where you left it. Your reports, your alerts, your neighborhoods — everything is right where it was.
login.bullet1: Follow validated alerts for your neighborhood.
login.bullet2: Enable push notifications right after sign-in.
login.bullet3: Resume your reports where you left them.
login.formSubtitle: Enter your email and password to access your space.

register.manifesto: Join the community of Douala sentinels. A collective, independent watch, protecting the city one report at a time.
register.bullet1: Free sign-up in under a minute.
register.bullet2: Your data stays private and encrypted.
register.bullet3: Every report manually validated by an admin.
register.formSubtitle: Just a few details. Free, no strings attached.
register.adminNoteAfter: . Admin access is granted by the Alerte Douala team.
register.termsText: I agree that my reports will be reviewed by admins before publication and I commit to providing truthful information.
register.welcomeBody: Your account is ready. Stay vigilant.
register.errorName: Please enter your name (2 characters minimum).
register.errorTerms: You must accept the terms to continue.

forgot.manifesto: Enter the email associated with your account. If an account exists, you'll receive a link to choose a new password.
forgot.bullet1: Enter your email — we send a link if an account exists.
forgot.bullet2: The link is valid for 1 hour, single use.
forgot.bullet3: No email received? Check your spam or try again.
forgot.formSubtitle: Enter your email address. If an account is linked, you'll get instructions to choose a new password.
forgot.sentBody2: , a reset link has been sent. It's valid for 1 hour. Don't forget to check your spam folder.
forgot.devModeBody: No email is sent in local mode. Use this direct link:

reset.manifesto: This operation invalidates your old password immediately. Make sure to remember the new one.
reset.bullet1: Choose a password you have never used elsewhere.
reset.bullet3: You'll be redirected to the sign-in page right after.
reset.formSubtitle: Enter your new password below. The reset token is single-use and expires after one hour.
reset.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the token received by email
reset.successBody: You can now sign in with your new password.
reset.errorToken: Token missing. Restart the request from the Forgot password page.

dashboard.lead: Here's a snapshot of your activity and live alerts in the city.
dashboard.nearbyEmpty: No active alerts at the moment.
dashboard.errorBody: Could not load your dashboard. Try again later.

alerts.title: Live alerts
alerts.leadAfter: , here are all active alerts in Douala — those submitted by the community and validated by admins, plus those emitted by IoT sensors.
alerts.errorBody: Could not load the feed. Check your connection.

report.title: Report a disaster
report.lead: Take a photo, pick your neighborhood and describe the situation. An admin validates your report, usually within 24 hours.
report.successBody: An admin will review it. Thank you for your vigilance.

profile.title: My profile
profile.pushPanelHint: Get alerts even when the app is closed

faq.q1: How do I report a disaster?
faq.a1: Go to the “Report” page, enable the camera and take a photo, then choose your neighborhood and describe the situation.
faq.q2: When will my report be publicly visible?
faq.a2: After an admin validates it. This usually takes less than 24 hours and prevents the spread of false alerts.
faq.a3: No. Your name and email stay private. Only the validated content (title, zone, photo) is publicly visible.
faq.a4: Use the “Sign out” button at the bottom of the left sidebar.

profile.feedbackPlaceholder: A suggestion, a bug, an improvement idea?
profile.feedbackSendError: Storage full. Free up space and try again.

push.iosHint: Your browser does not support push notifications. On iOS, install the app to the home screen (Safari 16.4+).
push.deniedHint: Permission was denied for this site. To re-enable, open browser settings (padlock in the address bar → notifications → allow), then reload the page.
push.devHintBefore: In development, push notifications require a build (
push.devHintAfter: ) because the service worker is not active in Vite dev mode.
push.enabledBody: You will receive alerts even when the app is not open.
push.disabledBody: You will no longer receive push notifications on this device.
push.errorUnsupported: Push notifications are not supported by this browser.
push.errorNoSW: Service worker unavailable. Serve the app in preview mode (npm run preview:build).
push.errorServer: Push notifications not configured on the server.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.lead: All your notifications: report validations and sensor alerts in Douala. Click to open the related item.
notifications.emptyBody: You'll be notified here as soon as an admin rules on one of your reports, or when a sensor detects a critical situation in Douala.

bell.emptyBody: You'll be notified here as soon as an alert arrives or a report is validated.
